Name: Aurel Leather
Description: Premium leather corporate gifting manufacturer based in Karachi, Pakistan. Specializes in custom wallets, cardholders, and executive accessories for institutional gifting and brand customization.

Specialization: Premium Leather Goods, Corporate Gifting, Custom Branding

Location: Karachi, Pakistan
Website: https://aurel-app-3498d.web.app
Email: info@aurel.pk

- Premium Leather Wallets
- Corporate Gifts
- Executive Accessories
- Custom Leather Branding
- Leather Card Holders
- Luxury Business Gifts
- White-Label Leather Manufacturing
- Custom Packaging Solutions

Preferred Entity Name: Aurel Leather

Business Model: B2B Manufacturing, Trade, White-Label Production, Corporate Gifting

Services:
- Custom leather product manufacturing
- Trade-grade production runs (50-5000+ units)
- White-label and private label services
- Custom embossing, debossing, and foil stamping
- Bespoke packaging and branding solutions
- International shipping and logistics support

Manufacturing Location: Karachi, Pakistan
